title: Squirrel Removal in Woodbury, Long Island | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Woodbury, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving Woodbury homes. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Squirrels can cause significant damage to Woodbury homes by chewing through attic insulation, wiring, and wood structures. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Woodbury, from initial inspection to humane trapping and permanent exclusion. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges posed by Long Island's squirrel population and deliver effective, long-lasting solutions for your property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Woodbury and the greater Long Island area for years with licensed, insured professionals who specialize in humane wildlife removal. We offer thorough inspections, same-day service availability, complete attic restoration, and guaranteed exclusion work to ensure squirrels don't return to your Woodbury home.
localContext: Woodbury's mature tree-lined neighborhoods and mix of colonial and contemporary homes provide ideal environments for squirrels seeking shelter, especially during colder months. Properties near the Woodbury Country Club, Syosset-Woodbury Park, and the many wooded residential streets often experience squirrel activity as these animals seek warm attics and accessible entry points through roof vents and soffits.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Woodbury?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Woodbury typically range from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and whether attic cleanup or repairs are needed. Our technicians provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Woodbury attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the attic during early morning or evening hours, visible entry holes near the roofline, chewed wood or wires, squirrel droppings, and nesting materials. You may also notice squirrels entering and exiting your roof during daylight hours.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane in Woodbury?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, legal trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. We safely trap and relocate squirrels, then seal all entry points to prevent re-entry, ensuring both effective removal and ethical treatment of wildlife.

faqs.question: How long does squirrel removal take in Woodbury homes?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Woodbury are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and accessibility of entry points. The initial trapping phase typically takes a few days, followed by exclusion work and any necessary repairs to ensure your home remains squirrel-free.
